rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0010
rows.name: What the[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0020
rows.name: is that giant structure?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0030
rows.name: And this[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0040
rows.name: voice?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0050
rows.name: Void is[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0060
rows.name: Void[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0070
rows.name: Elma-san, do you know him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0080
rows.name:
An entity that has survived
since ancient times,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0090
rows.name: the one who created the original Ares[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0100
rows.name: And[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0110
rows.name: the Growth are also[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0115
rows.name: creations born from Void[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0120
rows.name: You could call him their creator.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0130
rows.name:
Does that mean "The Great One"
Luxaar was talking about is[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0140
rows.name: Ohhh, so the myths were true after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0150
rows.name: But why is the Vita[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0160
rows.name:
To think The Great One's vessel was bested by
Earthling primitives! Reduced to a mere puppet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0170
rows.name: Yes, he means Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0180
rows.name: So that's the guy who beat me to a pulp[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0190
rows.name: Is this why he stole the Vita[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0200
rows.name: Is he[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0210
rows.name:
planning to rally the Growth
and start a war again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0220
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0230
rows.name: You can hear us?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0240
rows.name: I shall commence a contest for survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0250
rows.name:
The defeated shall simply cease
to be, along with this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0260
rows.name:
It is a sight I have witnessed
countless times before[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0280
rows.name: And I will be the victor once again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0290
rows.name: I will bring the world into concord[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0300
rows.name: Bring the world into concord...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0310
rows.name:
A sight you've witnessed countless
times, planets disappearing[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0320
rows.name: Does that mean Elma-san's planet too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0330
rows.name: And our Earth as well[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0340
rows.name:
Are you saying everything was
according to your plans?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0350
rows.name: The defeated shall simply cease to be[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0360
rows.name: That's quite the way to talk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0370
rows.name:
The only words I have for you
are "don't screw with me."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0380
rows.name: Give back the Ares's soul[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0390
rows.name: The defeated shall simply cease to be[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0400
rows.name: I don't recall being defeated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0410
rows.name: As long as I don't give up myself,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0420
rows.name: I absolutely will not lose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0430
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Do you intend to continue the struggle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0440
rows.name: That's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0450
rows.name: Wash your neck and wait for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0460
rows.name: That is also fine[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0470
rows.name: That too is the way life ought to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0480
rows.name: The inevitability of trying to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0490
rows.name: That is also fine[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0500
rows.name: Let us meet at the end of the world[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0510
rows.name: A contest for survival[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0520
rows.name: Do we have to[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0530
rows.name: start another new battle again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0540
rows.name: No[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0550
rows.name: It's not that simple.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0560
rows.name: Eh...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0570
rows.name: Regardless of whether we fight or not,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0580
rows.name: this planet is currently disappearing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0590
rows.name: Just like our homeworlds before it[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0600
rows.name: To survive means[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0610
rows.name: escaping from this world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0620
rows.name: That is the struggle we face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0630
rows.name: Escape from this world?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0640
rows.name: Al[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0650
rows.name: Are you saying you know a way to do that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0660
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0670
rows.name: The cores are the key to escaping.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0680
rows.name: The ones stolen by the Vita, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0690
rows.name: Without the cores, humanity... No,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0700
rows.name:
all living things on this
planet will cease to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0710
rows.name: What's the status of the Ares's analysis?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0720
rows.name: If things are going smoothly, by now[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0730
rows.name: a shocking truth should have come to light.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0740
rows.name: I will confirm it immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0750
rows.name: From here on out,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0760
rows.name: it's something even you don't know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0770
rows.name: It's study time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31190100_MSG0780
rows.name: Let's head to the quarantine hangar.[ST:wait ]
